_comment: Drag-resize preview in LOOSE order: a single Archers regiment (loose-order skirmishers) is staged alone (drill mode, no opponent), selected, then has its frontage widened by dragging its right-flank resize grip outward. The preview line drawn during the drag must span the regiment's REAL formed-up width -- loose-order spacing included -- so the line the player sees matches where the flank files will actually stand on release. Grip coordinates are derived from the spawn geometry (position 500,400, facing south): grips sit at position +/- half-width along the file axis. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
